title: Oceanfront
description: Adds vanilla styled content to minecraft's beaches
body:
**About Oceanfront 📖:**

Oceanfront is a mod that improves upon Minecraft's beaches and oceans by giving them more content and making them more interesting. Oceanfront attempts to be a Vanilla+ mod by not adding anything that doesn't feel out of place for Minecraft. 

**Versions and Mod Loaders 🔨:**

Oceanfront is currently only available for forge 1.19.4 and 1.20.1

**FAQ📝:**

**Can I use this mod in modpacks?**

Yes! You can use this mod in any of your modpacks as long as you don't take credit for the mod

**Will there be a fabric version?
**
Currently no fabric version is planned but we may make one in the future

**Do you have a Discord?**

Yes we do, any other questions you have or feedback you would like to share can be sent at our discord here: https://discord.gg/nG7EcXsdym

**Will Oceanfront be receiving updates?**

No Oceanfront is one of our old projects and is discontinued if you would like to see our other vanilla styled mods that are still receiving updates check out our discord
